all-countries.teaser_text: Planning to visit {locationName}? On greenbus.com.ua you can find bus tickets to {locationName}. Use the search form above to reserve a seat on a modern bus from trusted carriers.

how.title: How to Find a Bus Route
how.text: The 'All Countries and Cities' page helps you quickly find the right trip. Use the search at the top to enter a country or city name — the system will show all available routes and carriers. You can sort results by departure time, duration, or price.

popular.title: Popular GreenBus Routes
popular.item1: Ukraine – Poland: Kyiv – Warsaw, Lviv – Krakow, Lutsk – Poznan;
popular.item2: Ukraine – Germany: Kyiv – Berlin, Lviv – Munich;
popular.item3: Ukraine – Czechia: Lviv – Prague, Uzhhorod – Brno;
popular.item4: Domestic routes in Ukraine: Kyiv – Lviv, Kharkiv – Odesa, Vinnytsia – Dnipro.

countries.title: List of Countries and Cities
countries.text: GreenBus connects routes from over 50 Ukrainian cities: Kyiv, Lviv, Odesa, Dnipro, Kharkiv, Vinnytsia, Ternopil, Chernivtsi and others. International destinations include Poland, Germany, Czechia, Austria, Slovakia, Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia and dozens more countries.

benefits.title: Why Choose GreenBus
benefits.text: Up-to-date schedules, price comparison across carriers, and online ticket purchase with no queues. Your e-ticket arrives by email immediately after payment. Our support team is ready to help with refunds and route questions. And most importantly — no booking fee.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I book a ticket online with no booking fee?
faq.a1: Yes, on GreenBus you pay only the ticket price — no additional fees from the aggregator.
faq.q2: How do I find which cities have routes to Poland or Germany?
faq.a2: On the 'All Countries' page, select your destination and the system will show all available departure cities and carriers.
faq.q3: Can I get a refund on my ticket?
faq.a3: Refund policies are set by each carrier. Detailed information is shown on the route card before payment.
faq.q4: What payment methods are available on GreenBus?
faq.a4: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay and Google Pay. Your ticket is sent to your email after payment.
faq.q5: Do I need to print my ticket?
faq.a5: No, just show the e-ticket with QR code on your phone. Most carriers accept digital tickets.
faq.q6: Are there domestic routes within Ukraine?
faq.a6: Yes, GreenBus offers domestic bus routes between major Ukrainian cities — Kyiv, Lviv, Odesa, Kharkiv, Dnipro and others.
